allow: Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); const e=d.econ; console.log\('KZ Weekly 150,000 KZT pool'\); console.log\('prizePool:', d.spec.prizePool, d.cur\); console.log\('arpu:', e.arpu, 'KZT/mo'\); console.log\('ggrLiftMid:', e.ggrLiftMid\); console.log\('netMid:', e.netMarginMid\); console.log\('roi:', e.roi + '%'\);")
